title: File
description: The primary domain entity of the storage module. Every uploaded byte results in one File row. Polymorphic (fileable_type / fileable_id) so any consumer model can attach files via HasFiles + #[Attachable]. Content-addressable via sha256 with per-blob refcount so two tenants uploading the same PDF share physical bytes but hold separate File rows. Extends spatie/laravel-medialibrary's Media model internally (via SoftDelete + custom table); the wire contract shown here is the domain-visible shape.

owner_id.description: User who uploaded. Nullable for system uploads (backfills, migrations, DSAR export artifacts).

fileable_type.description: Polymorphic parent morph type. Nullable for standalone files (tenant-level assets, admin uploads).

fileable_id.description: Polymorphic parent primary key. Composite index with fileable_type.

kind.description: File-kind key from FileKindRegistry. Enforces mime + max_size + variants + retention. e.g. `avatar`, `document`, `newsletter_hero`.

collection.description: spatie media collection name. Usually equal to `kind`; distinct for models with multiple #[Attachable] per kind (galleries).

filename.description: Original filename from the upload. Preserved verbatim (URL-safe encoding applied at wire time).

name.description: Display name. Defaults to filename; user-editable via PATCH /api/v1/files/{file}.

size_bytes.description: Physical byte count. Consumed against `storage.bytes.consumed` entitlement.

sha256.description: Content hash (hex-encoded). Used for dedup + integrity check on read.

path.description: Tenant-scoped storage key. Convention: `tenants/{tenant_id}/{kind}/{sha256[0:2]}/{sha256[2:4]}/{sha256}.{ext}`. Never exposed on the wire (x-wire.hidden).

visibility.description: Enum: public / tenant / restricted. Governs signed-URL policy + who can request a URL.

virus_scan_state.description: Enum: pending / scanning / clean / infected / scan_failed / quarantined. Signed URLs never issue while state != clean.

virus_scan_result.description: Signature name when infected (e.g. `Eicar-Test-Signature`). Debug detail when scan_failed.

scanned_at.description: When the AV scan completed (regardless of outcome).

dedupable.description: Whether this row participates in content-addressable dedup. False = the physical blob is dedicated to this row even if another file has the same sha256.

reference_count.description: How many File rows reference this physical blob. Managed by ContentAddressableStore. Physical byte deletion happens when this hits 0 on the last-referring hard delete.

generated_variant_keys.description: Array of variant keys already generated. Written by GenerateFileVariantsJob after each variant lands.

is_system.description: True for system uploads that bypass ownership checks.

archived_at.description: Set when the row is archived (single=true replacement OR user-initiated archive). Distinct from deleted_at — archive keeps the blob for the retention window, delete triggers immediate refcount decrement.

custom_properties.description: spatie-native bag of arbitrary key/value metadata. Used for image dimensions, EXIF, PDF page count etc when the module discovers them post-upload.

metadata.description: Our HasMetadata trait's bag — tenant-supplied notes on the file.

indexes.name: files_tenant_kind_fileable_idx
indexes.description: Primary read path for HasFiles trait: 'give me all files of kind X attached to model Y'.

indexes.name: files_tenant_sha256_idx
indexes.description: Dedup + integrity check within a tenant.

indexes.name: files_virus_state_idx
indexes.description: Partial index for the antivirus dashboard + ScanFileForVirusesJob queue scan.

indexes.name: files_tenant_kind_idx
indexes.description: Quota reconciliation scan (sum size_bytes per kind).

x-content-addressable.note: When two tenants upload the same content, both get a File row pointing at the same physical path. reference_count on both rows tracks the shared blob's referent count — the ContentAddressableStore keeps them in sync via an aggregate scan. On hard-delete, refcount decrements; the last-referrer's delete triggers the physical byte removal.

owner_id.description: User ULID; nullable for system uploads.

fileable_type.description: Fully-qualified class name of the parent model. e.g. `Academorix\Branding\Models\Branding`.

fileable_id.description: Parent primary key. Format depends on the parent model's keyType (ULID for our models).

path.description: Physical storage key. NOT exposed on the wire by default.

reference_count.description: How many File rows reference this physical blob. Not exposed on the wire by default.

url.description: Computed. Freshly-signed download URL. TTL per plan tier + kind default.

variants.description: Computed. Map of variant_key -> freshly-signed URL. Only variants marked generated_variant_keys appear.

notes: Every read that includes a File in the response projects `url` + `variants` from the freshly-signed URLs (TTL applied per-read).
`sha256` + `disk` + `path` are internals; hidden by default. Include with `?include=storage_internals` for platform-admin surfaces only.
